issues.description: Effect is incomplete. Missing condition check for Leader type {Foxy Pirates}, missing GiveDon action, missing Rest action, and missing the conditional logic structure.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Should trash the Character itself (this card on board), not from hand. Should use 'KO' or similar board effect.
Missing condition: LeaderHasType with type '{Foxy Pirates}' to gate the entire effect.
Missing actions: GiveDon (add up to 1 DON card from DON deck) and Rest (rest the added DON).
